Wrapper records Claude/Codex readiness and Dream setup state
Wrapper emits systemd user timer templates without installing them automatically
Docs explain GitHub proof, local scheduler, headless Claude/Codex, local wiki/Dream, and future Mt. Olympus/Gas City roles

test_levels.rationale: Cross-vendor local orchestration touches shell, external CLIs, GitHub I/O, local auth/readiness, Dream, RPI/evolve, and future Gas City boundaries.
